result:
Both call sites confirmed. Here are the two `call_rcu()` call sites found via CodeGraph (cross-checked with grep/Read):

## 1. `kernel/sched/core.c:10380` (kernel/sched/)
```c
call_rcu(&tg->rcu, sched_free_group_rcu);
```
- 呼叫點所在函式:`sched_unregister_group()`
- Callback:`sched_free_group_rcu`
- Callback 定義:`kernel/sched/core.c:10367-10370`
  ```c
  static void sched_free_group_rcu(struct rcu_head *rcu)
  {
      sched_free_group(container_of(rcu, struct task_group, rcu));
  }
  ```
  它再呼叫 `sched_free_group()`(`kernel/sched/core.c:10359-10365`),內部釋放 fair/rt sched group、autogroup,最後 `kmem_cache_free(task_group_cache, tg)`。

## 2. `kernel/cred.c:156` (kernel/ top-level)
```c
call_rcu(&cred->rcu, put_cred_rcu);
```
- 呼叫點所在函式:`__put_cred()`
- Callback:`put_cred_rcu`
- Callback 定義:`kernel/cred.c:97-130`

**釋放的資源(以此為代表回答)**:`put_cred_rcu` 在寬限期後回收整個 `struct cred`——依序 `key_put()` session/process/thread keyring 與 request_key_auth、`put_group_info()`、`free_uid()`、`put_ucounts()`、`put_user_ns()`,最後 `kmem_cache_free(cred_jar, cred)` 把 `cred` 物件本身還給 slab cache。也就是說它釋放的是一個行程的完整憑證(credentials)物件及其掛在上面的所有子資源。

(補充:同樣是 `kernel/` 頂層的其他 call_rcu 呼叫點還有 `kernel/pid.c:159`→`delayed_put_pid`、`kernel/exit.c:232`→`delayed_put_task_struct`、`kernel/fork.c` 多處→`thread_stack_free_rcu`/`vm_area_free_rcu_cb`/`__delayed_free_task`,供對照。`kernel/rcu/` 目錄下的 `call_rcu` 幾乎都在 `rcuscale.c`/`rcutorture.c` 測試程式或 `update.c:607` 的 `early_boot_test_call_rcu()` 自我測試中,並非產品程式碼呼叫點。)
